title: viola purpurea subsp. venosa
intro: Viola purpurea subsp. venosa is a subspecies of the purple violet plant, also known as the fragrant violet or sweet violet, belonging to the family Violaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and infections. The health benefits of Viola purpurea subsp. venosa include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and mood swings. Herbal preparations of Viola purpurea subsp. venosa can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
